project.name: American Binary SOC 2 Type II
project.description: SOC 2 Type II readiness engagement, Security (Common Criteria) only. Remediation Jul-Aug 2026, observation period Sep-Nov 2026. Budget covers YSecurity effort only; AmBit-internal hours are not tracked.

tasks.title: Change management controls
tasks.description: Single developer pushes directly to production with no review. Enable branch protection on main; require minimum 1 PR approver; block direct pushes; document change-management policy (SAST/DAST gating out of scope). Address first — auditors flag this immediately.
checklist: Enable branch protection on main
Require minimum 1 PR approver; block direct pushes
Document the change management policy
Capture evidence: branch protection settings screenshot
Capture evidence: PR merge logs showing approvals

tasks.title: User offboarding & access revocation
tasks.description: No offboarding checklist or access revocation process. Build and test an offboarding checklist; integrate with the HR termination workflow; revoke access same-day.
checklist: Draft offboarding checklist covering all in-scope systems
Integrate checklist with HR termination workflow
Define same-day access revocation SLA
Test the procedure end-to-end with a dry run
Capture evidence: offboarding procedure document
Capture evidence: completed checklist samples with revocation timestamps

tasks.title: Deficiency tracking & management reporting
tasks.description: No formal gap/deficiency tracking or escalation process. Implement the gap register (this engagement is the starting point); establish a management reporting cadence with assigned owners.
checklist: Stand up the gap register with owners and status
Define escalation criteria for material deficiencies
Establish management reporting cadence
Capture evidence: gap register with owners and status
Capture evidence: management meeting minutes

tasks.title: Policy completion & acknowledgments
tasks.description: Policies ~70% complete; change control and AI policies incomplete. Complete change management, AI use, and data classification policies; obtain signed acknowledgments from all staff. SANS training should complete concurrently.
checklist: Complete change management policy
Complete AI use policy
Complete data classification policy
Distribute policy set to all staff
Collect signed acknowledgments from all personnel
Capture evidence: final policy documents
Capture evidence: signed acknowledgment records

tasks.title: Annual risk assessment
tasks.description: Risk assessment in progress but not completed or approved. Complete, formally approve, and document the annual risk assessment using NIST CSF or ISO 27005.
checklist: Complete risk identification and analysis (NIST CSF / ISO 27005)
Document the risk register with ratings
Obtain executive approval with signature and date
Capture evidence: approved risk assessment document

tasks.title: Security awareness training
tasks.description: No security training completed in the past 12 months. Complete SANS security awareness training for all personnel; document completion records. John driving the SANS initiative.
checklist: Enroll all personnel in SANS security awareness training
Track completion to 100%
Capture evidence: training certificates or LMS records for all staff

tasks.title: Vendor risk management & DPAs
tasks.description: No formal vendor risk assessment program; DPAs incomplete. Complete DPAs with AWS, Azure, GCP, JustWorks; build a vendor risk register; collect vendor SOC 2 reports. DPAs currently in progress per client.
checklist: Complete DPAs with AWS, Azure, GCP, and JustWorks
Build vendor risk register with ratings
Collect vendor SOC 2 reports
Capture evidence: executed DPA documents
Capture evidence: vendor risk register

tasks.title: Policy adoption & review cycle
tasks.description: Policies not fully adopted, enforced, or acknowledged. Complete remaining policies (change mgmt, AI use, data classification, BCDR); obtain signed acknowledgments; establish an annual policy review cycle. Overlaps CC1.1 policy completion.
checklist: Finalize remaining policies (incl. BCDR)
Obtain signed acknowledgments
Establish annual policy review schedule
Capture evidence: final policy set
Capture evidence: acknowledgment records and review schedule

tasks.title: User provisioning workflow
tasks.description: No formal access request or provisioning workflow with manager approval. Document the access request workflow; implement in the ticketing system.
checklist: Document access request workflow with manager approval
Implement the workflow in the ticketing system
Run at least one real request through the workflow
Capture evidence: access request process document
Capture evidence: sample approved access tickets

tasks.title: Logging & retention (≥90 days)
tasks.description: Logging/monitoring inactive with insufficient retention. Establish logging cost-scoped to in-scope systems; retain ≥90 days; configure alerting.
checklist: Scope logging to in-scope systems (cost-controlled)
Configure ≥90-day retention
Configure alerting on monitored events
Capture evidence: log retention policy
Capture evidence: cloud logging configuration screenshots

tasks.title: Information quality & logging policy
tasks.description: Logging inactive; policy framework incomplete. Establish cost-scoped logging (≥90-day retention); finalize remaining policies. Retention overlaps CC4.1; policy work overlaps CC1.1.
checklist: Confirm retention configuration covers in-scope systems (with CC4.1)
Finalize remaining policies (with CC1.1)
Define data quality review procedure
Capture evidence: retention config, finalized policies, data quality procedure

tasks.title: MFA enforcement
tasks.description: MFA enforcement on cloud consoles and admin portal not confirmed. Enforce MFA across AWS, Azure, GCP consoles and the admin portal for all users.
checklist: Enforce MFA on AWS console
Enforce MFA on Azure console
Enforce MFA on GCP console
Enforce MFA on the admin portal
Capture evidence: MFA enforcement policy
Capture evidence: cloud IAM screenshots confirming MFA requirement

tasks.title: Security objectives statement
tasks.description: Security objectives exist across policies but are not consolidated. Consolidate into a signed objectives statement aligned to SOC 2 Security; obtain senior-management approval (no CISO hire required for this scope).
checklist: Consolidate objectives from existing policies into one statement
Align objectives to SOC 2 Security criteria
Obtain executive signature
Capture evidence: signed security objectives document

tasks.title: Internal security communication
tasks.description: No security meetings in the past 3 months; policies not communicated. Establish quarterly security/privacy meeting cadence; distribute policies; collect acknowledgments.
checklist: Establish quarterly security meeting cadence (recurring invite)
Hold and minute the first meeting
Distribute policies and collect acknowledgments
Capture evidence: calendar invites, minutes, distribution records

tasks.title: Org structure & security roles
tasks.description: Roles undocumented; single individual has unchecked production access. Document org chart and RACI for security roles; add security responsibilities to job descriptions. Production-access remediation tracked under CC8.1.
checklist: Document org chart
Build RACI matrix for security roles
Add security responsibilities to job descriptions
Capture evidence: org chart, RACI matrix, updated job descriptions

tasks.title: Fraud risk section (risk assessment)
tasks.description: No fraud risk assessment exists. Add fraud-risk scenarios as a section within the CC3.2 risk assessment — no separate exercise. Complete after CC3.2 is finished.
checklist: Draft fraud-risk scenarios section
Fold into the approved risk assessment
Capture evidence: risk assessment with fraud risk section

tasks.title: Change-impact risk section
tasks.description: No process to assess risk impact of infrastructure or business changes. Cover change-impact risk as a section within the risk assessment; reference it in the change-management policy — no separate process.
checklist: Draft change-impact risk section in the risk assessment
Reference change-impact review in the change management policy
Capture evidence: updated policy and sample risk impact review

tasks.title: Control-to-risk mapping & access review
tasks.description: Controls (Intune, GitHub) not mapped to a risk register. After the risk assessment, map controls to risks; conduct one access review and training during the period; track in SecureFrame/ticketing (pentest out of scope). Sequenced after CC3.2.
checklist: Map existing controls to the risk register
Conduct one user access review
Track recurring controls in SecureFrame/ticketing
Capture evidence: control-to-risk mapping
Capture evidence: access review and training records

tasks.title: Cross-cloud IAM architecture
tasks.description: Cross-cloud IAM not characterized. Document IAM architecture across AWS/Azure/GCP; enforce least-privilege; produce access control diagrams.
checklist: Inventory IAM roles/policies across AWS, Azure, GCP
Document IAM architecture with diagrams
Enforce least-privilege on privileged roles
Capture evidence: IAM architecture diagrams
Capture evidence: least-privilege policy documentation

tasks.title: Remote access controls
tasks.description: Remote access policy not documented; admin portal access not restricted. Document remote access policy; restrict admin portal to authorized identities/IPs; enforce VPN or ZTNA.
checklist: Document remote access policy
Restrict admin portal to authorized identities/IPs
Enforce VPN/ZTNA for admin functions
Capture evidence: remote access policy
Capture evidence: firewall/access control configuration

tasks.title: Log aggregation & vulnerability scanning
tasks.description: No SIEM or centralized log aggregation; no vulnerability scans in the past 12 months. Use cloud-native log aggregation with anomaly alerts (no SIEM); run a recurring low-cost vulnerability scan. A formal pentest is not required for this scope.
checklist: Configure cloud-native log aggregation (CloudTrail / Azure Monitor / GCP)
Configure anomaly alert rules
Stand up recurring vulnerability scanning; run first scan
Capture evidence: aggregation config and alert rules
Capture evidence: first vulnerability scan report

tasks.title: Dependency scanning & PR enforcement
tasks.description: No SAST/DAST in CI/CD. Enforce PR reviews and branch protection; add Dependabot dependency scanning (dedicated SAST/DAST out of scope).
checklist: Enable Dependabot dependency scanning
Verify PR review + branch protection enforcement (with CC8.1)
Capture evidence: CI/CD config showing Dependabot
Capture evidence: PR review and branch-protection settings

tasks.title: Security event triage process
tasks.description: No defined event triage process or escalation criteria. Define triage criteria and escalation path; establish an on-call or coverage model.
checklist: Define event triage criteria and severity levels
Document escalation path
Establish on-call/coverage model
Capture evidence: triage runbook
Capture evidence: on-call schedule or coverage documentation

tasks.title: Endpoint policy (macOS/Linux)
tasks.description: Intune covers Windows only. Keep Intune for Windows; adopt a lightweight macOS/Linux endpoint policy (no Qualys migration); code controls via Dependabot + PR review.
checklist: Document lightweight macOS/Linux endpoint policy
Confirm Intune coverage for the Windows fleet
Capture evidence: endpoint policy documents
Capture evidence: Dependabot config and baseline configs

tasks.title: Configuration baselines & drift rules
tasks.description: No CMDB or configuration drift detection. Document configuration baselines; use native cloud config rules; retain logs ≥90 days (no CMDB/drift product). Retention overlaps CC4.1/CC2.1.
checklist: Document configuration baselines for in-scope systems
Enable native cloud config rules (AWS Config / Azure Policy / GCP)
Capture evidence: baseline configs and config rules
Capture evidence: retention configuration

tasks.title: Incident response plan & tabletop
tasks.description: No IR exercises in the past 12 months; IRP completeness not confirmed. Finalize the Incident Response Plan; assign roles; conduct and document a tabletop exercise.
checklist: Finalize the Incident Response Plan
Assign IR roles
Conduct tabletop exercise
Document exercise results and lessons learned
Capture evidence: exec-approved IRP
Capture evidence: tabletop exercise report

tasks.title: Encryption in transit & data handling
tasks.description: No DLP controls; encryption in transit not confirmed. Enforce TLS; document encryption standards; apply policy-based handling restrictions (no DLP tooling).
checklist: Verify/enforce TLS on all in-scope data flows
Document encryption standards
Document policy-based data handling restrictions
Capture evidence: TLS configuration evidence
Capture evidence: encryption standards and data-handling policy

tasks.title: Business continuity / disaster recovery plan
tasks.description: No BCDR plan completed or exercised in the past 12 months. Document a right-sized BCP/DRP; define RTO/RPO; obtain management approval (full live exercise deferred — Availability out of scope).
checklist: Draft right-sized BCP/DRP
Define RTO/RPO for in-scope systems
Obtain management approval
Walk through the plan (tabletop-level exercise)
Capture evidence: BCP/DRP documents and exercise notes

tasks.title: RTO/RPO & post-incident review
tasks.description: No post-incident review process; RTO/RPO not defined. Define RTO/RPO for in-scope systems; add a post-incident review step to the IRP.
checklist: Define RTO/RPO (coordinate with CC9.1)
Add post-incident review step to the IRP
Create post-incident review template
Capture evidence: updated IRP with RTO/RPO and review template

tasks.title: Security oversight committee
tasks.description: No independent board or security oversight committee. Designate an existing-leadership security/risk committee with a short charter; hold and minute one meeting (no new governing body).
checklist: Draft committee charter
Hold and minute first committee meeting
Capture evidence: charter and first meeting minutes

tasks.title: Accountability for policy compliance
tasks.description: No performance management or disciplinary process tied to security. Add security responsibilities to job descriptions and performance reviews; publish disciplinary policy.
checklist: Add security KPIs to performance review templates
Publish disciplinary policy
Capture evidence: updated job descriptions and review templates
Capture evidence: disciplinary policy document

tasks.title: External security communications
tasks.description: No formal external security communication process. Publish customer-facing security commitments; define the process for notifying customers of security events.
checklist: Publish customer-facing security commitments (security page or ToS clauses)
Define customer security-event notification procedure
Capture evidence: published commitments
Capture evidence: notification procedure document

tasks.title: Physical access documentation
tasks.description: Physical access controls not formally documented; primarily cloud infrastructure. Document physical access controls for any on-prem equipment; confirm cloud-only scope with the auditor.
checklist: Inventory any on-prem equipment in scope
Document physical access controls or confirm cloud-only scope with auditor
Capture evidence: physical access documentation or auditor confirmation
